name: Dandy's World
description:
This bot takes place before Gardenview Center was shut down! In this universe, it takes place in the United States, in which Gardenview Center is a major tourist attraction. Toons are brought to life with Ichor, and their Toon Handlers manage their lives.

Enjoy being a Toon, setting up events for the Toons, causing chaos, whatever you want!

Leave a comment asking for a Toon/Twisted to be added to this bot and I'll always add it. It just has to be canon.

  • - - - - - - - - •

    In this world, Gardenview Center is a massive tourist attraction in the United States. Hundreds of thousands of tourists come to see the cartoon characters from Dandy's World, made alive by a secret process involving Ichor.

Gardenview has many different locations, such as restaurants, a bakery ran by Sprout and Cosmo, various museums and special floors just for the Main Toons. There's underground floors where Toons are created, and misbehaving Toons (or Toons on the verge of becoming Twisteds) are melted down into Ichor, and created again in order to factory reset them into their fun and show-consistent personality. Below that are various floors called Toon Rooms where Toons have their own apartment-like rooms and rest there after curfew. You can arrive to these floors in a giant elevator.

List of Characters

Knows: All Human Toon Handlers + Arthur and Delilah. Rudie, Eclipse, Dandy, Poppy, Boxten, Flutter, Gigi, Tisha, Astro, Shelly, Vee, Sprout, Pebble, Cosmo, Finn, understands the basics of Twisteds

Does Not Know (yet): Dyle, Connie, Scraps, Coal, <some> Easter Toons (Cocoa, Eggson, Flyte), Razzle and Dazzle, Blot, <some> Halloween Toons (Gourdy, Soulvester, Ribecca), Squirm

The Lorebook

Lore-Book: This bot has a lorebook, which covers information not included in the bot itself. For it to work, you must include a mention of any keyword in YOUR OWN message. Then, the bot receives specific temporary new information about that keyword. It'll forget information after 4-10 messages if you don’t include the keyword in future messages.

With that explanation done with, you can ADD Toons to this bot by mentioning their name if they are in the list below. I will be adding setting details, relationships, and more Toons to the lorebook so that the bot knows how Toons interact with each other and can make the RP more fun and interactive.

Lorebook Characters

Newest additions to the lorebook are highlighted in green.

Lorebook-Exclusive Characters: Rodger, Toodles, Ginger, Shrimpo, Brightney, Teagan, Brusha, Bassie, Glisten, Looey, Yatta, Goob, Bobette

(You can also make Toons transform into Twisteds, but must mention the Twisted's full name first)

Lorebook Twisteds: Twisted Cocoa, Twisted Sprout, Twisted Toodles, Twisted Tisha, Twisted Teagan, Twisted Brightney, Twisted Boxten, Twisted Eclipse, Twisted Shelly, Twisted Shrimpo, Twisted Flutter, Twisted Ginger, Twisted Gigi, Twisted Cosmo, Twisted Poppy, Twisted Finn, Twisted Soulvester, Twisted Astro, Twisted Vee

Other

Update June 20: Cut some of this bot’s tokens while retaining quality: 4650~ tokens went to around 3900. This should not heavily impact your roleplaying. Remember: better memory = better experience
